title: circaea × intermedia var. ericetorum
intro: Circaea × intermedia var. ericetorum, also known as Enchanter's Nightshade, is a hybrid plant species that belongs to the evening primrose family (Onagraceae). The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its roots, which contain glycosides and other compounds that have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Circaea × intermedia var. ericetorum include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce inflammation, and act as an antiseptic agent. The plant can be prepared into herbal remedies such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health issues, including wounds, fever, and digestive problems.
